datasets.name: beir-fiqa
datasets.purpose: Financial QA retrieval with qrels; keeps continuity with existing FIQA RAG measurements.

datasets.name: beir-nfcorpus-scifact-hotpotqa
datasets.purpose: Domain variety across medical, scientific, and multi-hop QA retrieval.

datasets.name: msmarco-passage-dev-small
datasets.purpose: High-volume web passage retrieval and first-stage ranker quality.

datasets.name: trec-dl-2019-2020
datasets.purpose: Deep relevance labels for MS MARCO-style passage ranking.

datasets.name: miracl
datasets.purpose: Multilingual lexical+dense stress test, including languages where stemming/tokenization differs from English.

datasets.name: lotte
datasets.purpose: Long-tail entity and forum-style retrieval where lexical matching often matters.

datasets.name: bright
datasets.purpose: Harder retrieval problems that require robust hybrid ranking beyond keyword overlap.

datasets.name: rag-small-answerable
datasets.purpose: End-to-end retrieval plus generation smoke set with answer support checks.

datasets.name: synthetic-postgres-systems
datasets.purpose: Fast branch-local systems benchmark for hot/cold latency, QPS, build, storage, WAL, mutation, vacuum, and filter selectivity.

datasets.name: stackoverflow-latency
datasets.purpose: ParadeDB-style public latency harness: query files, stable timing windows, hot/cold runs, and pg_stat_statements.
